report.summary: Community growth cycle v13 (Mar 16): Bloomberg Screener V3 live data launch as lead narrative (Sprint 58 shipped); FOMC Wednesday March 19 angle drafted; Meme Launchpads page cleared for posting (PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty, all promoted); 300-page milestone tweet; Sprint 59 preview poll; full Thursday Mar 19 newsletter draft updated; 2 new SVG social cards created (Bloomberg Screener V3 Launch + FOMC/Crypto Tools).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Monday Mar 16): Bloomberg Screener V3 LAUNCH — 'mock data dies today'; live DefiLlama TVL/APY/Volume; CTA to /tools/bloomberg-screener
Tweet (Monday Mar 16): Bloomberg Screener live data insight — top 3 DeFi protocols by TVL as social proof the live feed is working
Discord/Telegram (Monday Mar 16): Sprint 58 live data announcement — Bloomberg Screener V3 real data live, all protocols listed
Tweet (Tuesday Mar 17): FOMC countdown — 2 days out; DCA Calculator + Fear & Greed Index as pre-decision tools
Tweet (Wednesday Mar 18): FOMC reaction — Fed decision day; Bloomberg Screener real-time DeFi data angle
Tweet (Wednesday Mar 18): Meme Launchpads Guide live — cleared from v12 hold, PUBLISH_QUEUE fully promoted
Tweet (Thursday Mar 19): 300 pages milestone — '300 tools, guides, and pages. 176 more coming in Sprint 59.'
Tweet (Friday Mar 20): Sprint 59 community poll — dApp guides vs AI courses vs exchanges vs yield tools; drives Sprint 60 signal

Newsletter (Thursday Mar 19): Full updated draft — Bloomberg Screener V3 as headline; GENIUS Act + Meme Launchpads + Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi in new pages section; FOMC market pulse; Pectra 23-day countdown in Degen Corner; 3 subject line variants

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-bloomberg-screener-v3-launch.svg — 1200×630 launch card: live DeFi protocol screener table (Lido $32.4B, Aave V3 $18.7B, EigenLayer $14.2B, Uniswap V4 $9.8B, Pendle $7.3B + 995 more); 'mock data dies today' hook; LIVE green badge; Sprint 58 ✓ label; 3 stat strips ($98.4B total TVL, 6.7% avg APY, $12.8B 24h vol); brand gradient title. Saved to /public/social-bloomberg-screener-v3-launch.svg

social-fomc-crypto-tools.svg — 1200×630 FOMC week card: 'Fed speaks today. Crypto reacts fast.'; BTC/FOMC historical returns bar chart (Sep 23 +3.1%, Nov 23 -2.4%, Mar 24 +7.2%, Sep 25 -3.6%, Mar 26 TODAY = ?); DCA Calculator + Fear & Greed Index tool cards; BTC $71,240 + Fear&Greed 72 + 23-day Pectra stat strip; amber FOMC TODAY badge. Saved to /public/social-fomc-crypto-tools.svg
